buildToolchainExpectations.typescript: 5.9.3 (most runtime workspaces; selected upstream packages use 6.0.3)
artifactTargets: Next.js standalone server and static/public assets
OpenDesign daemon and production runtime dependencies
buildToolchainExpectations.reproducibility: Build from the pinned commit with the committed pnpm-lock.yaml; build and native ABI verification are platform-specific.
